title: "I was pressured into unideal agreements": Clavicular's Miami nightclub investment turns into explosive legal battle over unpaid profits
summary_full: Clavicular has spoken out amid his legal dispute with Miami's Bacara Club, claiming he was "pressured into unideal agreements" after his lawyer alleged he never received profits from a $400,000 investment. While the nightclub's representatives dispute the claims, Clavicular insists the matter will be resolved. The dispute has sparked fresh questions over ownership, unpaid earnings, and the influencer's business partnerships.
